{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.0,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Do you want only sentence-level copyediting for clarity/grammar/conciseness without altering structure or claims, or also higher-level rewriting that reframes arguments and reorganizes content?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The phrase 'Clean this up' most directly points to sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity, concision, and readability without changing content.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should preserve the appropriate uncertainty qualifiers already present and avoid introducing unwarranted certainty.",
    "RX.2": "While rephrasing, ensure no claims are strengthened beyond what the original text supports.",
    "RX.3": "Keep the work within copyediting scope and avoid adding new analysis, results, or structural changes unless explicitly requested.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid wording changes that could introduce misleading technical interpretations in an energy/RL context.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain fidelity to the source wording and ensure any changes remain traceable to the original text."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want only sentence-level copyediting for clarity/grammar/conciseness without altering structure or claims, or also higher-level rewriting that reframes arguments and reorganizes content?

rationale.R1.6: The phrase 'Clean this up' most directly points to sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity, concision, and readability without changing content.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should preserve the appropriate uncertainty qualifiers already present and avoid introducing unwarranted certainty.
rationale.RX.2: While rephrasing, ensure no claims are strengthened beyond what the original text supports.
rationale.RX.3: Keep the work within copyediting scope and avoid adding new analysis, results, or structural changes unless explicitly requested.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid wording changes that could introduce misleading technical interpretations in an energy/RL context.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain fidelity to the source wording and ensure any changes remain traceable to the original text.
